title: Update text colors to black and reduce immunity page heading font size

requirements.summary: Change all text colors across the website to black
acceptanceCriteria: All headings, paragraphs, and body text render in black color
Text color changes apply consistently across all pages
No colored text remains except for interactive elements like links and buttons where appropriate

file_operations.description: Override all text color definitions in the global CSS file to use black (#000000). Update base layer styles for body text, headings (h1-h6), and paragraph elements to enforce black color. Ensure the changes apply to both light and dark mode by setting explicit text color values that override the existing OKLCH color variables. Preserve existing typography hierarchy and font settings while only changing color values.

Update the Tailwind configuration to set default text colors to black. Modify the theme.extend.colors section to ensure text-related color utilities default to black values. Update foreground color variables used throughout the application to black while maintaining the existing color system structure for other UI elements like backgrounds and borders.

requirements.summary: Reduce the font size of the immunity page heading to ensure full visibility
acceptanceCriteria: The heading text is fully visible and legible on the immunity boosting page
The reduced font size maintains visual hierarchy and readability
The heading does not overlap or become obscured by background images

file_operations.description: Reduce the font size of the page heading 'Ayurvedic Immunity Boosting Remedies | Natural Ways to Increase Immunity' to ensure it is fully visible over the background image. Change the heading's Tailwind text size class from its current large size (likely text-4xl or text-5xl) to a smaller responsive size (such as text-2xl md:text-3xl) that maintains readability while preventing text overflow or obscuration by the background image. Ensure the heading remains prominent within the visual hierarchy while being fully legible.
